item.title: The Decline of Deviance 2 摘要
item.description:
The article is a sequel to 'The Decline of Deviance,' exploring why risk-taking and rule-breaking have declined since the 1990s. The author argues this is largely due to increased prosperity, making people more cautious. While some see this as negative (less innovation), the author highlights positive outcomes like reduced teen smoking, drinking, pregnancy, and crime. The internet is dismissed as the primary cause since trends began before widespread broadband. Instead, the internet accelerates three phenomena: cultural carcinization (convergence on optimal strategies), de-frictioning, and the flat-Earth problem. The piece calls for appreciating these unearned societal wins while understanding their mechanisms.
标签: sociology, deviance, risk-taking, prosperity, cultural trends, internet effects, crime decline, innovation, social change, generational behavior

item.title: The ELIZA Archaeology Project 摘要
item.description:
The ELIZA Archaeology Project explores the history and impact of ELIZA, the pioneering chatbot created by Joseph Weizenbaum at MIT in the 1960s. The project aims to contextualize the program, explain its code, and examine Weizenbaum's later warnings about anthropomorphizing machines. It also discusses the 'Eliza Effect,' where humans attribute intelligence to simple computer programs, a phenomenon still relevant to modern AI like ChatGPT. The project includes an accurate reimplementation of ELIZA and links to an upcoming book.
标签: ELIZA, chatbot, AI history, Joseph Weizenbaum, Eliza Effect, human-computer interaction, MIT, Project MAC, AI ethics, anthropomorphism

item.title: My Conversation With ELIZA 摘要
item.description:
The author recounts trying the ELIZA chatbot, a 1960s natural language processing program, via a web re-creation. They find it unimpressive, describing it as barely better than if/then statements and far from passing the Turing Test. The transcript shows ELIZA's simplistic pattern-matching responses, often misinterpreting or repeating user input. The author concludes that while modern chatbot companions raise concerns, those who found ELIZA useful as a confidant must have had severe cognitive issues.
标签: ELIZA, chatbot, AI history, natural language processing, Turing Test, critique, retro computing, AI skepticism

item.title: Writing an LLM from scratch, part 34b -- from bigrams to GPT-2, one component at a time (in JAX) 摘要
item.description:
The author concludes a long-running series on building an LLM from scratch by implementing a GPT-2 model using JAX instead of PyTorch to ensure originality. Starting from a simple A-to-A model that reconstructs input, they incrementally add components, each improving performance. The final model, trained on an RTX 3090 for 37 hours, achieves a loss of 3.418784, outperforming both the equivalent PyTorch model (3.538161) and the original GPT-2 small (3.499677) on the same test dataset. However, OpenAI's weights still surpass it in instruction fine-tuning. The post details the progression and training results.
标签: LLM, GPT-2, JAX, training, deep learning, from scratch, PyTorch, transformer, machine learning, AI

item.title: Family Feud: Mac-assed Mac App Edition 摘要
item.description:
The author humorously uses a Family Feud format to explore which companies are best positioned to create a 'Mac-assed Mac app'—a high-quality, native macOS application. Apple is the obvious top choice. However, other tech giants like Anthropic (with its Electron-based Claude Desktop), Adobe, and Google fail to deliver, despite their resources. The author suggests an inverse correlation between company size/revenue and the quality of Mac apps, attributing this to a lack of 'care' in larger organizations.
标签: Mac apps, Apple, Electron, software quality, tech criticism, Anthropic, Adobe, Google, corporate culture, native apps

item.title: ‘Searching for SmarterChild’ Kickstarter 摘要
item.description:
DF reader AP shared a Kickstarter link for 'Searching for SmarterChild', a documentary about the AIM chatbot SmarterChild, which had 30 million users. The author, John Gruber, was unfamiliar with it but supports the project. The campaign has one week left and is slightly short of its primary goal. Gruber contributed and recommends it as an indie nerd documentary.
标签: chatbot, documentary, AIM, SmarterChild, Kickstarter, history, technology, AI, internet culture

item.title: Quoting Kenton Varda 摘要
item.description:
Kenton Varda, a tech lead, imposed a moratorium on AI-written change descriptions (PRs, commits, issues) for his team. He found AI-generated descriptions worse than useless because they detailed low-level code changes visible in the diff but omitted the high-level context needed to understand the code's purpose. This made PR reviews harder, not easier.
标签: AI, AI-assisted programming, code review, developer experience, generative AI, LLMs, PR descriptions, software engineering, team management

item.title: Mac Apps Can Escape From Squircle Jail If They’re Not in the Mac App Store 摘要
item.description:
macOS Tahoe's new app icons have been criticized, and third-party developers are restricted to squircle-shaped icons in the Mac App Store. However, apps distributed outside the Mac App Store can use the NSDockTilePlugIn API to display custom icons that persist even after quitting. Iris is one such app offering alternative icons. This technique is used by several Mac-native apps as a workaround, serving as a litmus test for apps that prioritize Mac-specific design.
标签: macOS, Tahoe, app icons, squircle jail, NSDockTilePlugIn, Mac App Store, Iris, third-party developers, workaround, Mac-assed apps

item.title: ‘PARRY Encounters the DOCTOR’ — Chatbot on Chatbot Action Circa 1973 摘要
item.description:
In 1973, Vint Cerf published an RFC documenting a conversation between two early AI chatbots: PARRY, simulating a paranoid schizophrenic, and ELIZA (DOCTOR), a psychotherapist. The transcript shows PARRY discussing bookies and racketeers, while ELIZA responds with therapeutic prompts. The article also notes that Vint Cerf, a key internet pioneer, retired from Google in 2026 at age 83.
标签: AI, chatbot, history, ELIZA, PARRY, Vint Cerf, RFC, 1973, internet, retirement

item.title: Introducing GPT‑Live 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI has upgraded ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model called GPT-Live, which can delegate complex tasks to GPT-5.5 in the background while maintaining conversation flow. The author had preview access and found the new model impressive, though they encountered a bug where the model would interrupt to laugh at non-jokes. They reported it and OpenAI made tweaks to reduce the issue. The previous voice mode used an older GPT-4o model with a 2024 knowledge cutoff, which limited its usefulness for brainstorming.
标签: AI, OpenAI, GPT-Live, voice mode, ChatGPT, GPT-5.5, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, LLM, generative AI

item.title: Rewriting Bun in Rust 摘要
item.description:
Jarred Sumner details the rewrite of Bun from Zig to Rust, driven by memory management bugs like use-after-free and double-free that safe Rust prevents. The rewrite was enabled by AI coding agents (Claude) using Bun's TypeScript test suite as a conformance suite, costing ~$165,000 in tokens. The Rust port is now live in Claude Code, with 10% faster startup on Linux. Sumner emphasizes that AI agents change the calculus on rewrites, allowing ambitious projects that were previously infeasible.
标签: bun, rust, zig, ai-assisted-programming, agentic-engineering, llms, anthropic, conformance-suites, memory-safety, software-rewrite

item.title: poppy the training box, part 1: the beginnings 摘要
item.description:
The author builds a dedicated local LLM training machine named 'poppy' to free up their daily driver PC 'perry' from long training runs. They repurpose an old SFF PC with a new case and 1600W PSU, then install a second-hand RTX 3090. Before the GPU upgrade, they test the old GTX 1660 Super with a cut-down GPT-2 small model, which takes 11 days to train and uses more energy than perry's faster run. After installing the RTX 3090, they plan to explore longer training runs and multi-GPU setups for testing cloud parallelism locally.
标签: LLM, training, hardware, GPU, RTX 3090, DIY, PC build, machine learning, JAX, PyTorch
